currentEvidence: Turn 84 says: "你从长椅上站起来。" Immediately after, it describes: "那光圈落在你搁在膝盖上的手背上".
conflictingEvidence: Within the same turn, the player has already stood up from the bench, so the seated posture with a hand resting on the knee is no longer naturally available.
reason: The narration briefly preserves a seated-body detail after the player has stood, creating a local posture continuity error.

currentEvidence: Turn 86 player input is "问她今晚打算住哪里", but the visible text renders the question as: "今晚——我住哪里？" and frames it as the player asking where they will stay.
conflictingEvidence: Turn 85 offered the choice "问她今晚打算住哪里", which asks about Karina's sleeping arrangement, not the player's.
reason: The generated text reverses the target of the player's question, changing an inquiry about Karina into an inquiry about the player's own lodging.

currentEvidence: Turn 87 says Karina raises her right hand and "那只银铃铛正悬在她的指间", then "卡琳娜把银铃收进口袋里". The final sentence still says light falls on "前方那枚还没被摇响的银铃".
conflictingEvidence: Turn 86 ended with Kar carrying the bell: "卡尔从小屋侧面绕出来——嘴里衔着一只小小的银色铃铛" and "银铃在她嘴里没有发出声响". No transfer to Karina is shown before turn 87 says Karina already has it.
reason: The bell changes holder from Kar's mouth to Karina's hand without visible transfer, and then remains visually lit after being put into Karina's pocket.

currentEvidence: Turn 90 first says: "卡尔在旁侧的步伐没有变化。" Later in the same turn it says: "卡尔在她转身的同时站起来".
conflictingEvidence: Turn 89 had already described Kar standing up and following when Karina resumed walking: "卡尔在她迈步时一同站了起来." Turn 90 itself also places Kar walking beside them before the later standing-up line.
reason: Kar is already walking in the current scene, so describing her as standing up again without any intervening sitting or stopping breaks action continuity.
